## Checklist

- [ ] `make validate` or `make validate-changed` passed locally
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or keys in the diff
- [ ] Root `world/` still stubs only, or N/A (framework-only change)
- [ ] No lore paste into `projects/` (cite `world/` paths if applicable)
- [ ] Reviewed [`CONVENTIONS.md`](../CONVENTIONS.md) contribution rules

- [ ] Examples (demo-world or demo-project)
